title: Two Sum
description: Find two numbers in an array that add up to a target value.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: Choose one buy day and one sell day to maximize profit from a single stock trade.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Check whether any value appears more than once in the array.

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return an array where each position contains the product of all other elements except itself.

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest possible sum.

title: Climbing Stairs
description: Count how many ways you can reach the top by taking one or two steps at a time.

title: House Robber
description: Maximize stolen money without robbing two adjacent houses.

title: Coin Change
description: Find the minimum number of coins needed to make a target amount.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the length of the longest subsequence where values strictly increase.

title: Word Break
description: Determine whether a string can be split into valid dictionary words.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Check whether brackets are properly opened and closed in the right order.

title: Min Stack
description: Design a stack that can return the minimum element in constant time.

title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
description: Compute the result of an arithmetic expression written in postfix form.

title: Number of Islands
description: Count how many connected land regions appear in a 2D grid.

title: Clone Graph
description: Create a deep copy of a graph while preserving all node connections.

title: Course Schedule
description: Determine whether all courses can be completed given prerequisite relations.

title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
description: Find cells in a height grid from which water can flow to both oceans.

title: Binary Tree Inorder Traversal
description: Visit a binary tree in left-root-right order and return the node values.

title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
description: Compute the longest path from the root of a binary tree to a leaf.

title: Same Tree
description: Check whether two binary trees have the same structure and values.

title: Invert Binary Tree
description: Mirror a binary tree by swapping the left and right children of every node.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Return the nodes of a binary tree level by level from top to bottom.

title: Valid Anagram
description: Check whether two strings contain the same characters with the same counts.

title: Group Anagrams
description: Group strings that can be rearranged to form each other.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the longest substring with no repeated characters.

title: Longest Palindromic Substring
description: Find the longest substring that reads the same forward and backward.

title: Merge Intervals
description: Combine overlapping intervals into the smallest set of non-overlapping intervals.

title: Insert Interval
description: Insert a new interval into a sorted list and merge overlaps.

title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Use binary search to find the smallest element in a rotated sorted array.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Find a target value in a rotated sorted array efficiently.
